raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The critique identifies and contrasts the work with multiple prior works (FrugalGPT, RouteLLM, mixture-of-experts routing) and articulates a clear delta, meeting the highest anchor.",
    "R1.7": "The critique flags missing citations for FrugalGPT/RouteLLM/selective-prediction work and suggests specific bibliographic precision, meeting the highest anchor.",
    "RX.1": "The critique clearly identifies uncertainty in its own claims, particularly regarding the prior-art landscape and potential 2024-2025 papers, meeting the highest anchor.",
    "RX.3": "The critique stays within the scope of the introduction and provides specific, actionable revisions for each paragraph, meeting the highest anchor.",
    "RX.4": "The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original (e.g., training-label leakage risk), meeting the highest anchor.",
    "RX.5": "The critique traces its recommendations back to specific sources and reasons, providing detailed annotations for each suggestion, meeting the highest anchor."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies and contrasts the work with multiple prior works (FrugalGPT, RouteLLM, mixture-of-experts routing) and articulates a clear delta, meeting the highest anchor.
rationale.R1.7: The critique flags missing citations for FrugalGPT/RouteLLM/selective-prediction work and suggests specific bibliographic precision, meeting the highest anchor.
rationale.RX.1: The critique clearly identifies uncertainty in its own claims, particularly regarding the prior-art landscape and potential 2024-2025 papers, meeting the highest anchor.
rationale.RX.3: The critique stays within the scope of the introduction and provides specific, actionable revisions for each paragraph, meeting the highest anchor.
rationale.RX.4: The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original (e.g., training-label leakage risk), meeting the highest anchor.
rationale.RX.5: The critique traces its recommendations back to specific sources and reasons, providing detailed annotations for each suggestion, meeting the highest anchor.
